mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_h5_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_h5_profile (user_id, display_name, st_display_name, persona, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{displayName}, #{stDisplayName}, #{persona}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE display_name = VALUES(display_name), st_display_name = VALUES(st_display_name), persona = VALUES(persona), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
